reviewer: agent build+matrix pass (Node real-inference verification + headless Chrome no-GPU honest-fallback, light+dark, mobile+desktop) — revision 1

rubric.evidence: REAL inference verified in Node (@huggingface/transformers 3.7.5, onnxruntime): pipeline('text-generation','onnx-community/glm-edge-1.5b-chat-ONNX') loads GlmForCausalLM (model_type 'glm' = the GLM-4 architecture) and generates — prompt 'Say hello in English and Chinese, briefly.' → 'English: Hello!\n\nChinese: 你好！'. In headless Chrome (no GPU adapter) the page shows the HONEST needs-WebGPU state — never a fake reply. screenshots: reports/responsive/screens/glm-4/desktop.png, reports/responsive/screens/glm-4/mobile.png
rubric.notes: WebLLM prebuiltAppConfig (v0.2.84) has NO glm/chatglm id (0/163), so this is the Transformers.js path; GLM-4-9B ONNX is ~5 GB (too big) — GLM-Edge-1.5B is the browser-feasible GLM family member.

rubric.evidence: Output is the standard text-generation chat-message array (out[0].generated_text.at(-1) = {role:'assistant',content:…}); bilingual semantics correct (EN+ZH in one reply). The 'see inside' top-k runs a raw forward pass → logits [1,seq,vocab] → softmax → real top candidates. Correct shape + semantics, not fake.

At-a-glance declares the exact model id (onnx-community/glm-edge-1.5b-chat-ONNX, linked to card), task (text-generation), architecture (GLM/GlmForCausalLM), backend (WebGPU, WASM opt-in), and dtype (q4f16). Inference runs in a module Web Worker (models/glm-4/worker.js). Conformance derives declares-model-id/task/backend/quantisation + inference-off-main-thread.

Loads through the shared createModelLoader auto-init architecture (no hand-rolled Load button). requiresWebGPU:true ⇒ a fresh headless profile shows the honest needs-WebGPU state before any download; on a WebGPU device a valid cached model auto-inits to ready with a Clear-cached-model control. Verified fresh-profile behaviour in headless Chrome. screenshots: reports/responsive/screens/glm-4/desktop.png, reports/responsive/screens/glm-4/mobile.png
rubric.notes: Agent-verified fresh-profile; cached auto-init requires a GPU device.

rubric.evidence: A role=status aria-live #status region announces checking→initialising→ready / generating / errors; the loader surfaces Download/Retry; a labelled needs-WebGPU fallback appears with exact enable steps PLUS an honest opt-in 'Run on WASM anyway (~1.3 GB)' button. Failures surface on the page (generation failed / WASM load failed), never only the console.
rubric.notes: Headless no-GPU exercised the needs-WebGPU + WASM-opt-in path.

rubric.evidence: System-prompt textarea, EN/ZH example chips, temperature + top_p range sliders (with live values), max-new-tokens number, greedy checkbox (disables sampling controls), Send/Stop/Clear buttons, and the 'Show next-token distribution' peek button — all real, labelled, keyboard-operable. Enter sends, Shift+Enter newlines.

Tokens come from the on-device generator; with no WebGPU adapter the page shows the honest needs-WebGPU state (or a real, opt-in WASM run) — no canned reply is ever presented as model output. Verified in headless (no-GPU ⇒ needs-WebGPU, send stays disabled until a real load).

All buttons expose accessible names; the system prompt and sampling controls have associated labels; state is announced via role=status aria-live. No images without alt (page is text/table only). Conformance images-have-alt + buttons-have-names derive as auto-checks.

responsive-check.mjs: desktop (1280×800) + mobile (360×740 DPR3) both automated-clean (no horizontal overflow). Screenshots reviewed: header, at-a-glance table, chips and chat composer all wrap and render Chinese glyphs legibly with no clipping. screenshots: reports/responsive/screens/glm-4/desktop.png, reports/responsive/screens/glm-4/mobile.png

All inference (generation AND the top-k forward pass) runs in a module Web Worker; the UI only appends streamed tokens, so the interaction path stays off the main thread and INP stays low. Streaming is incremental (per-token postMessage).

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Keep heavy JS off the interaction path so INP stays low.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — generation and the top-k softmax over the full vocab run in a Web Worker; the main thread only renders streamed tokens.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: models/glm-4/worker.js runs the pipeline + TextStreamer; index.html only appends deltas

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Offload / break up long main-thread tasks.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — inference is entirely off-thread; tokens stream incrementally via postMessage.

guidanceConsulted.query: responsive control panel without horizontal overflow
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Fluid flex/grid layout; wrap chips and controls; avoid fixed widths that overflow narrow viewports.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — .controls and .composer use flex-wrap; range inputs get max-inline-size:100%; bubbles use overflow-wrap:anywhere for long CJK/URLs.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: responsive-check desktop+mobile automated-clean; mobile screenshot reviewed, no overflow

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Accessible form controls with clear, associated labels.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — the system prompt textarea, sampling sliders, max-tokens number, and greedy checkbox all have associated labels; example chips are real buttons.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: run panel markup; conformance buttons-have-names derives as pass

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Label controls; announce state in a live region.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — role=status aria-live #status, labelled controls, keyboard send (Enter) / newline (Shift+Enter).

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Cross-document view transitions for catalogue↔page nav.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — @view-transition navigation:auto in the shared public/styles.css.

followUpGoals.goal: Add a GLM-Edge multi-model demo that pairs Whisper ASR → GLM for bilingual voice Q&A once capture-UX audio budget allows.

summary: Revision-1 build+matrix pass for glm-4 (GLM-Edge-1.5B-Chat, Zhipu's bilingual GLM-4-architecture model). Real bilingual inference verified in Node (GlmForCausalLM generates EN+ZH); headless Chrome with no GPU shows the honest needs-WebGPU state plus an opt-in WASM path — never fake output. Desktop+mobile automated-clean with screenshots reviewed; shared auto-init loader, off-main-thread worker, streaming, and full a11y semantics. WebLLM has no GLM id, so this is the Transformers.js path; GLM-Edge-1.5B is the browser-feasible member of the family (9B ONNX ≈ 5 GB).
